title: Nearasu 10 x Multi Use Sticky Glue Boards Traps for Pest and Insects, Extra Strong Glue Catcher, Safe Effective Pads For Home Indoor and Garden Outdoor Use Control Killer For Office Kitchen Warehouse
bullet_points: CATCHES VARIOUS PEST - Effectively traps insects, bugs, spiders, cockroaches, centipedes, crickets, flies, bugs, moths, and other unwanted pests, making it a versatile solution for your pest control needs. The trap has a peanut butter essence/scent that attracts pests. IMPORTANT: Use gloves when handling the traps to prevent human smell getting onto the trap, which may scare away pest.

ULTRA STRONG GLUE - The sticky glue boards feature an extra-strong adhesive that ensures pests are securely caught and cannot escape. Even in high-moisture environments, the glue's strength remains unaffected by water, making it a reliable solution for both indoor and outdoor use.

USE IT ANYWHERE - Suitable for both indoor and outdoor use, making it perfect for home, office, kitchen, garden, warehouse, and other locations where pests may be a problem. The Extra Strong Glue Traps are also ideal for food premises like processing factories, bakeries, takeaways and other difficult commercial situations where insecticides or poisons are impractical.

NON-TOXIC AND SAFE - The glue used in these traps is non-toxic, providing a safe option for households with children and pets. If it gets stuck on skin or fur, safely remove it with cooking, olive or vegetable oil.

EASY TO USE - Remove the covering paper and place the trap where pest activity has been observed. The trap has a peanut butter essence/scent that attracts pests. After catching the pest, simply dispose of the trap. If no pest is caught within 7 days, change the location of the trap. For dusty areas, it is recommended to fold the trap in a house shape, to prevent the dust covering the glue. If the trap is covered in dust or grease, replace it with a new trap.
